reason: Preserve Supermemory-specific operator ergonomics that are not expressed directly in the OpenAPI resource graph.

changes.summary: Archived spec includes x-pp-resource aliases for profile, recall search, and connection resource endpoints to avoid generated command/table collisions.
Map SUPERMEMORY_ADMIN_PROJECT to the x-sm-project request header so operators can scope every request to one Supermemory project.
Add regressions proving project scoping is set from environment while preserving configured custom headers.

changes.path: README.md, SKILL.md, AGENTS.md, internal/cli/agent_context.go, internal/mcp/tools.go, manifest.json, tools-manifest.json
changes.summary: Document and expose SUPERMEMORY_ADMIN_PROJECT for CLI, agent-context, and MCPB users.

validated_outcome: go test ./internal/config passed after patch; full package and publish gates rerun before submission
